name: Redrock Refuge
description:
Years into the future, colonizing other planets is more than just the wet dream of tech bros on social media. And you are one of these lucky inhabitants of one of the biggest colonies on Mars!
---
No content warnings, but a warning that this is obviously a sanbox bot, which means **you'll have to edit and regenerate a lot of messages until the llm gets its shit together. I did my best to prevent it from speaking or acting for you, but it will describe what you see, hear, smell, etc. It helps keep the story going.**
**Try and give it long messages as it will respond better that way.**
---
This is (hopefully) a working sanbox version of [this bot](https://janitorai.com/characters/a5d17c91-90ba-429c-8350-d91bc49526fb_character-planetary-colonization-testing-program) that i worked on whenever the site and college allowed me to, i feel like i could polish it even more but my brain is just mush right now, like i said on the reviews of my last bot i'll stop writing for a couple of days.
Because i like making my bots connect to each other, these androids are advanced versions of [D05](https://janitorai.com/characters/f1fad351-6053-4899-81eb-a02037f3cf15_character-d-05)
What does that mean lore-wise? No clue, it's all fake and i just came up with it right now, D05 is now also stronger than the terminator. You're welcome to try and make sense of it in the reviews and i might make bots to expand on it once i get more ideas going. (is this how scott cawthon made fnaf?)
creator: dawardo
